THE BRAND

Redefining Luxury
Underfoot

MONOLITO™ is India's most premium designer metallic epoxy flooring brand — a sub-brand of Omendra Developers Pvt. Ltd., crafted for those who demand extraordinary surfaces. Every floor we create is a singular work of art: seamless, timeless, and built to last generations.

⬡
METALLIC DEPTH
3D swirling metallic pigments create an otherworldly surface unlike anything else
◈
SEAMLESS SURFACE
Zero joints, zero grout — a pristine unbroken canvas across any space
◎
BESPOKE DESIGN
Custom colour combinations matched to your exact interior vision
◇
EASY CARE
Dust-proof, chemical-resistant, anti-bacterial luxury that is effortless to maintain
20
YEAR WARRANTY
  • International standard application process
  • Premium imported pigments & resin systems
  • Certified & trained applicator teams
  • Site assessment & design consultation
  • Post-installation support & care guide
  • Registered Trademark — MONOLITO™
  • Pan-India service coverage

OUR FINISHES

Surfaces We Create

From intimate private residences to grand commercial spaces — each finish is crafted with obsessive attention to detail

01
⬡
METALLIC EPOXY
Our signature finish. Swirling metallic pigments suspended in crystal-clear resin create an otherworldly, three-dimensional surface. Every floor is genuinely unique.
SIGNATURE FINISH
02
◈
SOLID COLOUR EPOXY
Clean, contemporary and bold. A seamless solid colour floor in any shade — the perfect foundation for modern interiors that demand absolute perfection.
CONTEMPORARY
03
◇
MARBLE EFFECT
The timeless elegance of marble, crafted in resin. Intricate veining patterns that replicate natural stone — at a fraction of the cost and none of the maintenance.
TIMELESS LUXURY
04
◎
3D EPOXY FLOORING
Breathtaking illusion floors — oceans, galaxies, forests beneath your feet. Custom 3D artwork sealed under a flawless, crystal-clear epoxy topcoat.
STATEMENT DESIGN
05
▣
FLAKE / TERRAZZO
Coloured vinyl flakes broadcast over a base coat create a rich terrazzo-inspired surface — ideal for premium commercial, institutional and industrial spaces.
COMMERCIAL GRADE
06
◰
POLISHED CONCRETE
The raw beauty of concrete, ground and polished to a mirror-like sheen — industrial elegance for lofts, creative studios and premium contemporary spaces.
INDUSTRIAL CHIC

APPLICATION METHODOLOGY

The Art of Application

Six precision stages — each one critical to the depth, durability and artistry of every MONOLITO™ floor.

01
PREPARATION
Surface Assessment
Substrate inspected, abraded and all defects filled. Moisture tested to specification before any coating begins.
DIAMOND GRINDING CRACK REPAIR
02
FOUNDATION
Primer & Bond Coat
Two-part epoxy primer penetrates and seals the substrate, creating the high-adhesion bond that governs longevity.
EPOXY PRIMER 8–12 HR CURE
03
BODY COAT
Metallic Pigment Layer
Metallic pigments seeded into wet epoxy and hand-manipulated — the signature swirling depth effect where artistry meets science.
METALLIC PIGMENTS BESPOKE PATTERN
04
DESIGN PHASE
Mid Coat & Lock-in
Transparent mid coat applied over the design — locking in the pattern, levelling texture and forming the base for final protection.
CLEAR EPOXY DESIGN LOCK
05
PROTECTION
UV-Stable Topcoat
Two coats of UV-stable PU or epoxy topcoat deliver abrasion resistance, chemical resistance and the final gloss or matte finish.
UV-STABLE PU GLOSS / MATTE
06
COMPLETION
Polish, Cure & Handover
Inspected under controlled light, polished and handed over with a care guide. Full cure in 7 days. 20-year warranty issued on completion.
7-DAY CURE 20-YR WARRANTY
WHY MONOLITO

The MONOLITO™ Difference

01
🏆
PREMIUM MATERIALS ONLY
We use exclusively international-grade epoxy systems and imported pigments — the foundation of a floor that lasts decades without compromise.
02
🎨
TRULY BESPOKE DESIGN
No two MONOLITO™ floors are identical. Every project is custom-designed for the specific space, lighting and aesthetic vision of the client.
03
🛡️
20-YEAR WARRANTY
The confidence of a two-decade warranty on every floor we install — backed by our written guarantee and after-care support programme.
04
🇮🇳
PAN-INDIA COVERAGE
Our certified teams operate across India — Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad and all major metros and Tier-1 cities.
05
⚡
MINIMAL DISRUPTION
Most installations are completed within 3-5 working days — minimal disruption to your home or business with a clear project timeline.
06
📋
END-TO-END SERVICE
From initial consultation and design to application, curing and handover — we manage the entire process so you do not have to.
HOW WE WORK

Our Process

A seamless journey from first conversation to finished floor

1
CONSULTATION
Free site visit and design consultation. We understand your vision, assess the substrate and recommend the perfect MONOLITO™ finish.
2
DESIGN & QUOTE
Custom design presentation with colour samples and finish options. A detailed, transparent project quote with clear timelines.
3
APPLICATION
Our certified teams prepare the substrate, apply the system in precision-controlled multiple coats and finish with a protective topcoat.
4
HANDOVER
Final inspection, care guide handover and 20-year warranty documentation. Your floor — perfected.
